program.name: Feel Free — Summer 2026 Guerrilla Field Sampling
program.compliance: Kratom-containing SKUs are sampled to 21+ only. BAs verify government-issued photo ID for anyone appearing under 40 and refuse anyone under 21 or who declines ID. No BA consumption of sampled product. Sampling occurs on public sidewalks / street corridors; no on-premise venue sampling without written property permission. Per the SOW, Client secures all permits, property permissions, and the weekly Kratom Eligibility Schedule.

Thu.vibe: Arts district / breweries / World Cup watch parties

Sat.why: Highest weekend daytime foot traffic; beach-bar 21+ crowd.
